name: OptionalPortal

generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: OptionalPortal
Description: OptionalPortal is a optional portal UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: mantine, optional, other, portal

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Portal/OptionalPortal.tsx
import { factory, Factory, useMantineEnv } from '../../core';
import { Portal, PortalProps } from './Portal';

export interface OptionalPortalProps extends PortalProps {
  /**
   * Determines whether children should be rendered inside Portal.
   * When false, children are rendered as regular React children.

   * Note: In test environment, Portal is always disabled regardless of this value.

   * @default true
   */
  wit
